title: parnassia palustris subsp. californica
intro: Parnassia palustris subsp. californica, also known as the California grass-of-Parnassus, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the family Celastraceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Parnassia palustris subsp. californica are said to include soothing sore throats and calming digestive issues, as well as providing relief from skin irritations and wounds. The plant is often prepared as a decoction or tincture for medicinal use, and can also be consumed as a tea to harness its potential health benefits.
